popular.title: The Former Strongest Hero Lives as a Side Character
Zense Seijo wa Te o Nukitai Yokiyoki
Dareka Ookami-san no shitsuke-kata shirimasen ka?!
Zensei wa Ken Mikado. Konjou Kuzu Ouji
Megami to Kekkon Shite Isekai de Shinkon Seikatsu
Honzuki no Gekokujou: Hannerōre no Kizoku-in Gonensei Ichi – Koishite Mitai O’hime-sama
Isekai Shoukan Oji-san no Juumusou Life – Sabage Suki Salaryman wa Kaisha Owari ni Isekai e Chokki suru
Shinimodori no Akuyaku Reijou wa, Nidome no Jinsei de Subete o Shiawase ni Shitemiseru
Youkoso Shuudouin e, Koko wa Tsuihou sareta Onna-tachi no Rakuen yo
“Bijin de Okane Mochi no Kanojo ga Hoshii” to Ittara, Wake Ari Joshi ga Yattekita Ken
“Honyaku” no Sainou de Ore Dake ga Sekai wo Kaihen Dekiru Ken
